metadata.name: staticmap
metadata.summary: A small, python-based library for creating map images with lines and markers.

functions.name: staticmap.staticmap._lon_to_x
documentation:
transform longitude to tile number
\:type lon: float
\:type zoom: int
\:rtype: float

functions.name: staticmap.staticmap._lat_to_y
documentation:
transform latitude to tile number
\:type lat: float
\:type zoom: int
\:rtype: float

functions.name: staticmap.staticmap._simplify
documentation:
---
param points: list of lon-lat pairs
param tolerance: tolerance in pixel
return: list of lon-lat pairs
rtype: list
type points: list
type tolerance: float
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.Line.__init__
documentation:
Line that can be drawn in a static map

```
param coords

an iterable of lon-lat pairs, e.g. ((0.0, 0.0), (175.0, 0.0), (175.0, -85.1))

type coords

list

param color

color suitable for PIL / Pillow

type color

str

param width

width in pixel

type width

int

param simplify

whether to simplify coordinates, looks less shaky, default is true

type simplify

bool
```

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.Line.extent
documentation:
calculate the coordinates of the envelope / bounding box: (min_lon, min_lat, max_lon, max_lat)

```
rtype

tuple
```

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.CircleMarker.__init__
documentation:
---
param color: color suitable for PIL / Pillow
param coord: a lon-lat pair, eg (175.0, 0.0)
param width: marker width
type color: str
type coord: tuple
type width: int
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.IconMarker.__init__
documentation:
---
param coord: a lon-lat pair, eg (175.0, 0.0)
param file_path: path to icon
param offset_x: x position of the tip of the icon. relative to left bottom, in pixel
param offset_y: y position of the tip of the icon. relative to left bottom, in pixel
type coord: tuple
type file_path: str
type offset_x: int
type offset_y: int
---

classes.name: staticmap.staticmap.Polygon
documentation:
Polygon that can be drawn on map

```
param coords

an iterable of lon-lat pairs, e.g. ((0.0, 0.0), (175.0, 0.0), (175.0, -85.1))

type coords

list

param fill_color

color suitable for PIL / Pillow, can be None (transparent)

type fill_color

str

param outline_color

color suitable for PIL / Pillow, can be None (transparent)

type outline_color

str

param simplify

whether to simplify coordinates, looks less shaky, default is true

type simplify

bool
```

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.__init__
documentation:
---
param background_color: Image background color, only visible when tiles are transparent
param delay_between_retries: number of seconds to wait between retries of map tile
  requests
param headers: additional headers to add to http requests
param height: map height in pixel
param padding_x: min distance in pixel from map features to border of map
param padding_y: min distance in pixel from map features to border of map
param reverse_y: tile source has TMS y origin
param tile_request_timeout: time in seconds to wait for requesting map tiles
param tile_size: the size of the map tiles in pixel
param url_template: tile URL
param width: map width in pixel
type background_color: str
type delay_between_retries: int
type headers: dict
type height: int
type padding_x: int
type padding_y: int
type reverse_y: bool
type tile_request_timeout: float
type tile_size: int
type url_template: str
type width: int
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.add_line
documentation:
---
param line: line to draw
type line: Line
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.add_marker
documentation:
---
param marker: marker to draw
type marker: IconMarker or CircleMarker
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.add_polygon
documentation:
---
param polygon: polygon to be drawn
type polygon: Polygon
---

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.render
documentation:
render static map with all map features that were added to map before

```
param zoom

optional zoom level, will be optimized automatically if not given.

type zoom

int

param center

optional center of map, will be set automatically from markers if not given.

type center

list

return

PIL image instance

rtype

Image.Image
```

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap.determine_extent
documentation:
calculate common extent of all current map features

```
param zoom

optional parameter, when set extent of markers can be considered

type zoom

int

return

extent (min_lon, min_lat, max_lon, max_lat)

rtype

tuple
```

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap._calculate_zoom
documentation:
calculate the best zoom level for given extent

```
param extent

extent in lon lat to render

type extent

tuple

return

lowest zoom level for which the entire extent fits in

rtype

int
```

documentation:
transform tile number to pixel on image canvas
\:type x: float
\:rtype: float

methods.name: staticmap.staticmap.StaticMap._y_to_px
documentation:
transform tile number to pixel on image canvas
\:type y: float
\:rtype: float
